---
title: "TidyTuesday with Fable"
---

A series of exploratory data analysis sessions on [TidyTuesday](https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday) datasets,
produced as a live conversation between Jon Minton and Claude (Fable 5).

The aim: see how far an hour of conversational data science can go — questions, plots, models, and
interpretation emerging in real time.

## Sessions

- **[Who gets to stay home? European parenting leave, 1970–2024](parenting-leave.qmd)**
  (TidyTuesday 2026-06-02) — the arrival of co-parent leave, definitional traps in
  harmonised policy data, and what 55 years of leave policy do (and don't) say about
  the fertility decline debate.
- **[Is the video game movie curse lifting?](game-films.qmd)**
  (TidyTuesday 2026-06-09) — a 15-minute sprint: the ¥5bn Pokémon box-office trap,
  three decades of rotten reviews turning a corner in 2019, and why opening-night
  audiences grade these films a letter or three above the critics.
